<!-- GENERATED by scripts/gen-step-catalog.sh — do not edit by hand. -->

# Core step vocabulary (catalog)

These are the Gherkin steps wired to `vauchi-core` via cucumber-rs
(`core/vauchi-core/tests/steps/*.rs`). A scenario built **only** from these
steps executes as a real test; a scenario with any other step is skipped
(see `problems/2026-07-04-cucumber-backgrounds-fail-silently`).

**Authoring guidance (write new scenarios pre-wired):**

1. Compose scenarios from the steps below — reuse is the point (the suite's
   original failure was ~1.2 uses per step pattern; a healthy suite reuses a
   small vocabulary). `{string}` / `{int}` are parameters.
2. Need a step that isn't here? Add a `#[given/when/then]` in the core steps
   crate first, then re-run `scripts/gen-step-catalog.sh` to update this file.
3. `scripts/check-step-catalog.sh` reports, per feature, how many steps the
   catalog already covers — aim to raise it.
4. Steps describing UI (`I tap …`, `I should see …`, colours) or two parties
   (`Alice and Bob exchange …`) are out of scope for the core runner — tag
   those features `@ui` / leave them for the multi-party harness.

## Given (setup)

- `a user {string}`
- `contact {string} is in group {string}`
- `contact {string} is in label {string}`
- `I am creating an identity backup`
- `I am launching Vauchi for the first time`
- `I am logged into Vauchi`
- `I am on the identity setup screen`
- `I am on the settings screen`
- `I am viewing my contact card`
- `I block contact {string}`
- `I have a contact {string}`

- `I have a group {string}`
- `I have a label {string}`
- `I have a phone field {string} with value {string}`
- `I have a visibility group {string}`
- `I have an address field {string} with value {string}`
- `I have an email field {string} with value {string}`
- `I have an exchanged contact {string}`
- `I have an existing identity`
- `I have an existing identity as {string}`
- `I have just created a new identity`
- `I make field {string} visible only to group {string}`
- `I make field {string} visible only to label {string}`
- `my display name is {string}`
- `the device has secure storage available`
- `the Vauchi application is installed`

- `{string} and {string} complete a QR exchange`

- `I confirm the setup`
- `I create a group {string}`
- `I delete the group {string}`
- `I enter {string} as my display name`
- `I enter backup password {string}`
- `I enter password {string}`
- `I hide field {string} from contact {string}`
- `I make field {string} private`
- `I make field {string} visible only to contacts {string}`
- `I make field {string} visible only to group {string}`
- `I make field {string} visible only to label {string}`
- `I make field {string} visible to contact {string}`
- `I remove contact {string}`
- `I remove contact {string} from group {string}`
- `I rename group {string} to {string}`
- `I save the changes`
- `I save the field`
- `I select {string}`
- `I set the label to {string}`

- `I set the value to {string}`
- `I try to set an empty display name`
- `I unblock contact {string}`
- `I view my identity details`

## Then (assertions)

- `{string} has {string} as a contact`
- `a new Ed25519 keypair should be generated`
- `all contacts can see my {string} field`
- `an encrypted backup file should be generated`
- `an X25519 exchange keypair should be derived`
- `contact {string} can see my {string} field`
- `contact {string} cannot see my {string} field`

- `I should be able to copy the fingerprint`

- `I should have {int} contacts`
- `I should not be able to proceed`
- `I should not have a contact {string}`

- `I should see my public key fingerprint`
- `I should see the identity setup screen`
- `my contact card should have a custom field labeled {string}`
